headline: How major US stock indexes fared Friday 5/8/2026
summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average edged up less than 0.1%, and the Nasdaq composite rose 1.7% to its own record.  Monster Beverage and Akamai Technologies helped lead the market after reporting better profits for the latest quarter than analysts expected.  The Nasdaq composite rose 440.88 points, or 1.7%, to 26,247.08.

headline: Anthropic signs $1.8 billion AI cloud deal with Akamai, Bloomberg News reports
summary: Artificial intelligence startup Anthropic has signed a $1.8 billion computing deal with ‌Akamai Technologies to meet surging demand ‌for its AI software, Bloomberg News reported on Friday, citing ​people familiar with the matter.  • Akamai shares rose 25% on Thursday after the company had disclosed a long-term cloud deal with a frontier ‌model provider, without ⁠naming the partner, in its earnings statement.  • CEO Tom Leighton told Reuters that Akamai is in a good position to secure access to all ‌the components, CPUs and GPUs, ​even as component prices ​have risen.

raw.headline: Anthropic signs $1.8 billion AI cloud deal with Akamai, Bloomberg News reports
raw.summary: Artificial intelligence startup Anthropic has signed a $1.8 billion computing deal with ‌Akamai Technologies to meet surging demand ‌for its AI software, Bloomberg News reported on Friday, citing ​people familiar with the matter.  • Akamai shares rose 25% on Thursday after the company had disclosed a long-term cloud deal with a frontier ‌model provider, without ⁠naming the partner, in its earnings statement.  • CEO Tom Leighton told Reuters that Akamai is in a good position to secure access to all ‌the components, CPUs and GPUs, ​even as component prices ​have risen.

headline: Is It Time To Reassess Akamai Technologies (AKAM) After Strong Recent Share Price Gains
summary: If you are wondering whether Akamai Technologies stock is offering fair value at around US$116.69, it helps to look beyond the headline price and into what that figure really represents. The stock has logged returns of 13.3% over the last 7 days, 2.5% over 30 days, 37.1% year to date and 36.6% over the past year, which naturally raises questions about how expectations and risk are being priced in. headline: Piper Sandler Hikes Cloudflare Price Target to $250 Despite 15% After-Hours Drop: Buy the Dip?
summary: Piper Sandler analyst James Fish raised his price target on Cloudflare (NYSE:NET) to $250 from $222, keeping an Overweight rating, even as the stock cratered after Q1 FY2026 earnings. Cloudflare shares fell roughly 24% on May 8, extending an after-hours slide following the report. For prudent investors, Fish’s call reads as a textbook buy-the-dip endorsement ... Piper Sandler Hikes Cloudflare Price Target to $250 Despite 15% After-Hours Drop: Buy the Dip?

headline: US stocks rise to records after a solid jobs report overshadows higher oil prices
summary: The S&P 500 climbed 0.8% Friday to an all-time high after a report said employers added more jobs last month than expected, even though the war with Iran is raising fuel costs and uncertainty.  Monster Beverage and Akamai Technologies helped lead the market after reporting better profits for the latest quarter than analysts expected.  The S&P 500 climbed 0.9% and was on track to top its all-time high after a report said U.S. employers added 115,000 more jobs than they cut last month, even though the war with Iran is raising fuel costs and uncertainty for everyone.

raw.headline: US stocks rise to records after a solid jobs report overshadows higher oil prices

Monster Beverage and Akamai Technologies helped lead the market after reporting better profits for the latest quarter than analysts expected.  The S&P 500 climbed 0.9% and was on track to top its all-time high after a report said U.S. employers added 115,000 more jobs than they cut last month, even though the war with Iran is raising fuel costs and uncertainty for everyone.
